triggers: multi-commit PR re-modifies a commit-1 path

edgeCases.scenario: commit-2 re-modifies foo.ts v1->v2; merge must record the v2 TIP blob, not v1
edgeCases.expected: manifest foo.ts.blobSha == v2 tip; reconcile cur===blobSha gate fires
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: recordShip --merge updates a re-shipped path to its tip blob (EC1)
cli/__tests__/reship.test.mjs: reship merges the re-pushed paths

edgeCases.scenario: rename old.ts->new.ts: old passed to --pr, absent in WT
edgeCases.expected: old.ts op:delete (pre-deletion blob from FETCH_HEAD) supersedes stale modify; new.ts op:add
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: a renamed-away old path supersedes its stale modify entry with a delete (EC2)

edgeCases.scenario: path added in commit-1, deleted in commit-2, path exists on PR tip
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: a path added in commit-1 then deleted later supersedes the add with a delete (EC3)

edgeCases.scenario: path added AND deleted within ONE --pr commit (never on PR tip)
edgeCases.expected: classify returns null -> silently dropped (benign no-op)
edgeCases.notes: documented in the writer header; nothing of it actually shipped

edgeCases.scenario: parseArgs gets `--merge --` ; must not consume the `--` as merge's value
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: parseArgs --merge is a valueless boolean

edgeCases.scenario: merge mode, every passed path unresolvable in $WT
edgeCases.expected: entries.length===0 fail (return 1) BEFORE the no-existing-entry throw; manifest untouched
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: all-unresolvable merge fails before the no-entry throw (EC6)
edgeCases.notes: validation ordering: entries-empty check is before the lock

edgeCases.scenario: merge with NO existing entry (initial best-effort write failed)
edgeCases.expected: returns 1, writes nothing; reship logs non-fatal; BOTH commits' paths unrecorded
coveredBy: cli/__tests__/ship-manifest.test.mjs: merge with NO existing entry returns 1, writes nothing (EC7)
edgeCases.notes: explicit decision: honest miss (a fallback would falsely prune commit-1 paths)

edgeCases.scenario: parallel ship to a different branch during reship merge
edgeCases.expected: per-branch key; full read-modify-write under mkdir-lock; both entries land
coveredBy: existing: merges into an existing v1 manifest, preserving other branches

edgeCases.scenario: reconcile prunes feat/X (PR merged) between commit-1 and commit-2 reship
edgeCases.expected: merge throws no-entry; commit-2 paths lost (best-effort). Window not reachable in intended flow (re-pushing to a merged branch is nonsensical)
edgeCases.notes: prune is post-merge only; not realistically reachable

edgeCases.expected: writer never called (insert point is AFTER the push); no manifest write on failed push
coveredBy: cli/lib/ship/reship.sh: push block exits 1 before the writer call
existing reship test: push rejection path
edgeCases.notes: insert point is strictly after a successful push
